item.title: A young woman with cancer recorded her fight and recovery process. Fuck cancer.
item.dc:creator: ExistenceIsPainWasTaken

item.title: Ignorance is dangerous
item.description: "No matter how much you shame and scare them, women will still come for abortions. Pretty recently I had this young woman, 15 maybe, and we did the procedure. I said, ‘Your uterus is empty, the procedure is over. I have to go check to make sure we got everything,’ and I left the room to examine the tissue. Then I came back and told her, ‘Everything’s fine, your uterus is healthy.’ And she said, ‘So … when are you going to use the steel ball?’ I picked my jaw up off the floor and said, ‘Steel ball?’ She said, ‘Well, I went to the crisis pregnancy center and they told me you’re going to put a steel ball that’s covered with sharp blades into my uterus and twirl it around.’ And this kid still came! I was thinking, How did you ever make yourself walk in the office believing I was going to do that?". Bad politics are disgraceful. Remember to vote for the less harmful
item.dc:creator: anthora

item.title: The crow realizes that the mouse is afraid of him and leaves a piece of food to the mouse.
item.dc:creator: smartguy1337

item.title: My perpetraitor just died
item.description: My father abused me during my teenyears, 12 to 19 years old and it ended when I told my mother. We reported him to the police. My father actually got sent to prison for 4,5 years (got out after 3 even though he didn't behave). I haven't talked to him since that day when I pretented to go to school but instead met up with my mother and went to the police. I have been waiting for him to die though. I still have complex PTSD symtoms from the abuse and my life with him. It has been 19 years since the police report and I STILL DREAM that I am back in his violence like I never even left. Feels so real sometimes But I never imagned what it would feel like when he actually died. A relative that I have never spoken to, contacted me yesterday to tell me that he passed away, alone in his apartment for days before anyone even noticed. This person also told me that he had been trying to abuse someone else in the family and I know that he also got convicted for sexual harassment on a 18 year old a few years ago. So now I am free from him for real, he does no longer excist in this world. Most of all I am glad that he can no longer hurt anyone else. We are so many that are echoes of his evilness. He was a monster and now he is dead. May he not rest in peace.
item.dc:creator: portraitofmine

item.title: The future is here and it is glorious!
item.description: We have Netflix and Disney+ and I just cant afford any more. I tried to find Walking Dead the other day, and I found it on a service I dont have. Got a free 1 week trial. I actually remembered to unsubscribe before the week was up. Yay me, I guess. Edit: A friend of mine suggested I try MyFlixr. Im actually impressed. No viruses so far, and all my favorite 90s movies are there (not an ad, just me wanting to share). I havent used it for a while, though, so idk if its still good.
item.dc:creator: MrsPrendsen

item.dc:creator: DumpingSh1tandBeingKind2

item.title: Trans person goes undercover to report on the Far Right
item.description:
This was from their first infiltration video, which featured a hate church. I cannot imagine the courage it would take to go into the places they do as a trans person, let alone to engage and pretend for so long. They're a total badass.
Dead Domain is their handle on most platforms, and their content is fantastic, imo. This image is from part 1 of their infiltration of CPAC (Conservative Political Action Conference), where a surprising amount of GQP men are on Grindr :) I'm not sure how imgur is with dropping links, but I'll try to show a few ways to find them. Please show them some support if you find the content worthwhile! https://www.youtube.com/@deaddomain is their main channel https://youtu.be/W2I-59uDtIk?si=_NAQZmyBoHjpLycq is the church video https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=m0WFA6zswnY&t=2347s is part 1 of CPAC
Picture from their Twitter because awesome cosplay, but also to use this space to say that Project 2025 is a real thing that the GOP/GQP is openly planning. Things have been this bad before in history, I think, but it is up to us to be sure they don't get worse while we try to move forward.
Just look at that overview. Good luck to us all.
item.dc:creator: LiterallyAGoblin

item.title: Time for an unhinged Sunday Mini-CeleryDump for the good & bad people of Imgur
item.description:
no reason why it shouldn't be.. greetings online friends. quickie tonight
not sure if they mean ED-209 is the principal or Dick Jones. either way i love Robocop
far out
snacks are good
usually a sci fi guy but here.. fantasy. not a fan of being restrained
it should be a competition
gonna get wasted and use that glove without supervision
relatable
just remember that the next time you are about to diss my dump
i'd rather not
that's my time.. have a great night, gang!!

item.dc:creator: anthora

item.title: Finally....
item.description: *edit* Because it was asked, she's a 2019 Honda Insight Hybrid. At the time of purchase, it was 28K and I leased it for 4 years. I broke the lease a few months early and got a loan from my bank. Been paying the bank for the last 1.5 years. I also added an extra 4 years to the bumper to bumper warranty to cover anything that may come up. The warranty covers everything except the high voltage battery and that is because it's considered a consumable. All in all, the total cost was around 40K. One last note, they hybrid system is fantastic. I average 50 MPG on around 9 gallons of gas. I recommend it to everyone.
item.dc:creator: Steelrose

item.title: the language is fluid ! (also, yay 4th person pronouns !)
item.description: but I've never heard anyone call for Chat IRL, so this may be an american thing also, should society collapse in the near future and return to obscurantism, I hope Chat becomes deified as an all-watching, all-seeing god that can impart wisdom as much as it can lead you astray. that'll be funny.

item.title: Watching Idiocracy for the first time.
item.description: Imgur seems to like it, so I'm going in. Mike Judge so gotta be worth a try. No, I will not clean my screen, fuck you. **** UPDATE **** Finshed it. Absolutely loved it! Very clever, funny and its all gonna hapoen. How did I miss it? Need recommendations......
